steps.title: Identify the defining goal
steps.content: The task requires emphasizing a difference between quintidi and decadi, which demands explicit contrast language showing what makes each type of day distinct.

steps.title: Apply to find the contrast
steps.content: Choice B directly contrasts the two with “whereas”: quintidi honored animals (the ram), decadi honored agricultural tools (the sieve). Choices A, C, and D either discuss only one type of day or fail to draw a distinction. That matches choice B — B is correct.
